features.title: TasksList fixes
features.description:
Allow sorting of tasks and display them in reverse to begin with.
The status dropdown should be the same as the one StatusControl uses.
The search box needs to be bigger and the Clear button only showing if searching. This can just be a (x) icon at the end of the search input.

features.title: The Tooltip for DependencyBullet should show close to the center of the screen
features.description:
In many cases when the DependencyBullet is close to the right or bottom edge, the tooltip it shows gets cut off by the window end.
Whenever the tooltip is close to an edge - it should offset in the opposite direction.

features.title: ChatView errors
features.description:
When opening ChatView - there's an error:

validateDOMNesting(...): <button> cannot appear as a descendant of <button>.
    at button
    at span
    at button
    at li
    at ul
    at nav
    at aside
    at SidebarContent (http://localhost:5173/src/renderer/components/ui/CollapsibleSidebar.tsx:50:40)

features.title: Board view fixes
features.description: Fix clicking. Only drag works - not even key press does.

features.title: TaskService should be the only interface for task related ops
features.description: Currently TasksIndex (TasksIndexSnapshot) is exposed as well as dependencyResolver. These should not be available outside of the TaskService - this service should be the only interface for handling tasks.

features.title: TaskService should be the only interface for task related ops
features.description: TaskService should be the only interface to handle tasks - it uses TaskIndex

features.title: TaskService should be used only for task related ops
features.description: All references to task ops must go through TaskService. All involved files are in the context.

features.title: ChatsManager shouldn't be using getIndex but the other methods directly from other managers
features.description: If possible - managers should reference each other via import not directly passed in the constructor

features.title: main.js needs to be thin
features.description: All the 'files' ipc handlers should be moved to the FilesManager - they should be performing these actions, that's why they're there for.

features.title: ChatsManager needs to follow ProjectsManager
features.description: ProjectsManager has been refactored - make ChatsManager follow the same exact patterns. ProjectsManager is in the isolated world, and ProjectsService in rendeder - make sure chats follow the same patterns.

features.title: FilesManager needs to follow ProjectsManager
features.description: ProjectsManager has been refactored - make FilesManager follow the same exact patterns. ProjectsManager is in the isolated world, and ProjectsService in rendeder - make sure files follow the same patterns.

features.title: TasksManager needs to follow ProjectsManager
features.description: ProjectsManager has been refactored - make TasksManager follow the same exact patterns. ProjectsManager is in the isolated world, and ProjectsService in rendeder - make sure tasks follow the same patterns.

features.title: NotificationsManager needs to follow ProjectsManager
features.description: ProjectsManager has been refactored - make NotificationsManager follow the same exact patterns. ProjectsManager is in the isolated world, and ProjectsService in rendeder - make sure notifications follow the same patterns.
